function solve(prices, strategy, k) {

    const n = prices.length;

    // Compute original profit

    let originalProfit = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        originalProfit += strategy[i] * prices[i];

    }

    // Compute delta0 and delta1 arrays

    const delta0 = new Array(n).fill(0);

    const delta1 = new Array(n).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        delta0[i] = (0 - strategy[i]) * prices[i];

        delta1[i] = (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i];

    }

    // Compute prefix sums for delta0 and delta1

    const prefix0 = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix1 = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix0[i + 1] = prefix0[i] + delta0[i];

        prefix1[i + 1] = prefix1[i] + delta1[i];

    }

    // Now, find the maximum gain from modifying a window

    let maxGain = 0;

    const halfK = k / 2;

    for (let s = 0; s <= n - k; s++) {

        // First half of window is from s to s + halfK -1 (inclusive)

        // So the sum is prefix0[s + halfK] - prefix0[s]

        const sumFirst = prefix0[s + halfK] - prefix0[s];

        // Second half is from s + halfK to s + k -1 (inclusive)

        // So the sum is prefix1[s + k] - prefix1[s + halfK]

        const sumSecond = prefix1[s + k] - prefix1[s + halfK];

        const total = sumFirst + sumSecond;

        if (total > maxGain) {

            maxGain = total;

        }

    }

    return originalProfit + Math.max(maxGain, 0);

}
